title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.140 - Both parties appear — proceedings
text:
534.140.  Both parties appear — proceedings. — When both parties appear before the judge in person, or by agent or attorney, at the time appointed for the trial of the cause, the judge shall proceed to examine the complaint and proofs of the parties, and judgment shall thereupon be rendered according to the finding of the judge, as herein directed.
(RSMo 1939 § 2842, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2456; 1919 § 3004; 1909 § 7666 
Effective 1-02-79
